manifestComponentSnapshot.styleDescription: Copy the component-specific style description from asset-manifest.json.
manifestComponentSnapshot.promptCore: Copy the component-specific prompt core from asset-manifest.json.
preserve: Copy every component-specific preserve rule from asset-manifest.json.
avoid: Copy every component-specific avoid rule from asset-manifest.json.

styleLockSnapshot.renderingMedium: Replace with the approved medium and rendering language.
styleLockSnapshot.contrast: Replace with approved value and contrast structure.
lighting: Replace with approved lighting direction and source.
surfaceTexture: Replace with approved texture and wear language.
shapeLanguage: Replace with approved silhouette and proportion language.
preserve: Replace with invariants copied from the visual target.
avoid: Replace with forbidden visual drift copied from the visual target.

promptSections.goal: Create one production game asset for the declared Unity usage.
promptSections.subject: Describe the exact object, pose, state, silhouette, and readable details.
promptSections.composition: Describe framing, viewpoint, scale, safe margins, and object placement.
promptSections.paletteLighting: Copy the approved palette roles, value range, temperature, and lighting.
promptSections.materialsTexture: Copy the approved materials, surface wear, and rendering medium.
promptSections.outputContract: Opaque matte background, no text, no watermark, no extra objects; preserve the registered cell boundaries when a batch plan is used.

promptText: Assemble the labeled prompt sections in background/scene -> subject -> key details -> constraints order. For edits, explicitly say change only the subject and keep every invariant unchanged.
